heading_content_part: DMV privacy policyPrivacy PolicyFriday, September 28, 2018DMV privacy policy

decoder_heading: User privacy policy is very important to us
ident_heading: User privacy policy is very important to us
heading_content_part: User privacy policy is very important to us.This web document represent the privacy policy for DMV driving motor vehicle app. We tried to cover the all privacy policy, security and user profile related information. Still if you have problem you can contact us this email.

Android permissions required by device:-## ACCESS_NETWORK_STATEIt is required to check the current state of Network of device.## ACCESS_WIFI_STATEThe permission is used to check the wi fi state of device. If the internet is not on, then assist you to turn on the internet as required to check the DMV tests.## INTERNETIt is required to give the exact data of nearby solution such as tyre shop. In order to see the traffic signs and images internet is required.## WRITE_EXTERNAL_STORAGE & READ_EXTERNAL_STORAGE:-
It is essential for giving user the personalized experience.

decoder_heading: Which data could have by third party networks
ident_heading: Which data could have by third party networks
heading_content_part: Which data could have by third party networks?:-1. Device related information such as manufacturer, model, Android OS version2. Demographic data such as locations, country, city etc3. Interest based information4. Demographic info like gender, age group etc5. Personal information such as email address.

decoder_heading: We do not store any data at our side
ident_heading: We do not store any data at our side
heading_content_part: We do not store any data at our side. The third party networks could use your data to show ads and analytic service. We do not guarantee how they handle data as those information is our of our control.

decoder_heading: However, we can suggest that Third party networks are very concerned
ident_heading: However, we can suggest that Third party networks are very concerned
heading_content_part: However, we can suggest that Third party networks are very concerned about safeguarding the confidentiality of your information. They do not collect Personal Information, and they employ administrative, physical and electronic measures designed to protect your Non-Personal Information from unauthorized access and use. Please be aware that no security measures that we take to protect your information is absolutely guaranteed to avoid unauthorized access or use of your Non-Personal

decoder_heading: However, we can suggest that Third party networks are very concerned
ident_heading: However, we can suggest that Third party networks are very concerned

decoder_heading: We do not assure the exact data handling of these third party networks
ident_heading: We do not assure the exact data handling of these third party networks
heading_content_part: We do not assure the exact data handling of these third party networks as this area is out of our control. To know better about their privacy policy look at this.
Use of application:-If you have problem or suspect about any point of privacy policy. You can uninstall the app, as soon as you uninstall app we will not have any access of your data.
